story.label: Who We Are
story.title: Born in Morocco. Built for Travellers.
story.p1: Sahara Visite was founded in 2010 by Youssef El Mansouri, a Marrakchi who grew up watching travellers fall in love with Morocco – and watching unscrupulous operators take advantage of their enthusiasm.
story.p2: His vision was simple: create a travel company run by Moroccans, for the world, that would showcase the authentic beauty of the kingdom while supporting the local communities that make it so special.
story.p3: Today, Sahara Visite has guided over 8,000 travellers from 60+ countries through Morocco's imperial cities, Saharan dunes, Atlantic coastline, and High Atlas mountains. Our team of 15 certified guides speaks 8 languages between them.

member3.bio: Sahara expert and Toubkal certified mountain guide. His camel caravans are legendary.

member4.bio: Ensures every Sahara Visite journey runs flawlessly from first inquiry to final goodbye.

about.label: About MorocElite
about.title: The quiet art of Moroccan luxury
about.p1: We are a boutique atelier of travel — composing private journeys for guests who value time, beauty, and flawless execution. From the first conversation to your final transfer, a single concierge owns your file.
about.p2: Our relationships with riad owners, camp operators, and guides have been cultivated over years. That access translates into rooms held for you, doors opened at the right moment, and itineraries that feel effortless.

reviews.quote: Best luxury experience in Morocco! Every detail felt considered — from the riad to our private guide in the medina.
reviews.name: Alexandra M.

reviews.quote: The desert camp was beyond imagination. MorocElite understood exactly the level of comfort we wanted.
reviews.name: James & Claire T.

reviews.quote: Impeccable planning and discretion. We discovered places we would never have found on our own.
reviews.name: Sophie L.
